title: Snake
subTitle: A young farm girl, ensnared by a sinister stranger's lies, must wield the truth to rescue her family from impending danger.

title: Operation Romeo
subTitle: A young man and a woman in love head out during the nocturnal hours. However, chaos ensues when they meet two strangers on their way.

title: Love Hostel
subTitle: A series of bloodshed, escapes and deception ensue when Jyothi and Ashu elope together and her family hires a ruthless mercenary to kill the couple.

title: Bangistan
subTitle: Hafeez and Praveen, two brainwashed suicide bombers, go on a mission to blast a meeting of religious leaders in Poland. However, due to a turn of events, they change their minds about the bombing.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Sye Raa Narasimha Reddy
subTitle: Uyyalawada Narasimha Reddy, the ruler of the Rayalaseema region, resists the tyranny of the East India Company and sparks a revolution in the process.

title: Gangubai Kathiawadi
subTitle: A woman is forced to abandon her Bollywood dreams after her boyfriend sells her to a brothel. As time passes, she builds strong connections in the criminal underworld and rises to power.

title: Crew
subTitle: Three ambitious female cabin attendants from Mumbai get caught in a web of lies during their pursuit of dreams, leading to an unexpected heist.

title: Aranmanai 4
subTitle: Suspicious about his sister's death, Saravanan, a lawyer, tries to solve the mystery behind it, only to discover a mysteriously dark force at play.

title: Supreme Khiladi
subTitle: A charitable trust faces threats from a powerful mafia leader who has set his eyes on its land. He plans to kill the legal heir to grab the wealth, but a brave taxi driver becomes an impediment.

title: Kalki 2898 AD
subTitle: In a post-apocalyptic world, a group of people set out to save a woman pregnant with Lord Vishnu's 10th and final avatar, Kalki, from an evil supreme god-king, Yaskin.

title: Dhadak
subTitle: A world of uncertainties awaits Madhu and Parthavi as their love transcends class divides and blossoms despite the fierce disapproval of their families.

title: Dhadak
subTitle: A world of uncertainties awaits Madhu and Parthavi as their love transcends class divides and blossoms despite the fierce disapproval of their families.

title: Thai Massage
subTitle: Upon finding his body does not work like it used to, a man embarks on a self-discovery journey. He meets a travel blogger and starts bonding with her.

title: Footfairy
subTitle: A CBI officer investigates a string of gruesome murders committed by a serial killer with a foot fetish. However, things take an ugly turn when he gets close to catching the killer.

title: Gul Makai
subTitle: Malala Yousafzai, an advocate for female education, speaks up for women who were denied the right to education under the Sharia law by the Taliban.

title: Naam Shabana
subTitle: Shabhana, desperate for justice, agrees to join a secret intelligence agency in exchange for their help in unmasking her friend's murderer.

title: Apna Sapna Money Money
subTitle: Arjun and Shivani are in love, but Shivani's father will never let them marry each other. Later chaos ensues when Arjun enlists the help of his conman cousin, Kishan, to unite him with Shivani.

title: Bruce Lee
subTitle: Bruce Lee and his friends get into a fight with the close aides of Ramdoss, an evil don. When the gangster kidnaps Lee's girlfriend, he plans to rescue her.

title: Aitraaz
subTitle: When a company chairman's trophy wife stirs up a storm in a happily married employee's life, the tumultuous winds drag all of them into an intense courtroom showdown.

title: Alludu Adhurs
subTitle: A young man named Sreenu swears off women following a failed relationship. However, he falls in love with a gangster's daughter and is even forced to compete with another man for her hand in marriage.

title: Krantiveer
subTitle: Pratap, a gambler disowned by his family, comes under the care of a landlord named Laxminath. When corrupt forces lead to Laxminath's murder, Pratap seeks revenge.

title: Baaghi
subTitle: Determined to rescue his former love, the ruggedly handsome Ronny confronts his enemies with a flurry of powerful roundhouse kicks and bone-crushing punches.

title: Baaghi
subTitle: Determined to rescue his former love, the ruggedly handsome Ronny confronts his enemies with a flurry of powerful roundhouse kicks and bone-crushing punches.

title: Cheeni Kum
subTitle: Buddhadev Gupta, a 64-year-old chef, falls in love with a 34-year-old software engineer, Nina. However, their future becomes uncertain when he discovers that her father is six years his junior.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Luck by Chance
subTitle: Vikram can't believe his luck when he is chosen for a Bollywood lead role. However, the role may ruin his relationship with his girlfriend.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Mission Majnu
subTitle: An undercover Indian spy takes on a deadly mission to expose a covert nuclear weapons program in the heart of Pakistan that could destroy the free world.

title: A Flying Jatt
subTitle: Donning a mighty cape and a heart of gold, a quirky Punjabi superhero whooshes through low-altitude escapades and fights the humongous villain who threatens the world.

title: Qatil Saya
subTitle: A police officer investigates the mystery behind unnatural deaths after taking charge of his new post at a hill station.

title: Maine Pyar Kiya
subTitle: Prem and Suman fall in love with each other, only to be torn apart by family differences. However, Suman's father is willing to give Prem one last chance where he must prove himself worthy of Suman.

title: Himmatwar
subTitle: The son of a wealthy man leaves his family post a misunderstanding. Later, when he saves a police officer from an evil man, this results in him earning the latter's wrath.

title: Geetha Govindam
subTitle: Vijay Govind, a young lecturer in a college, wishes to get married at the earliest. He tries to woo Geetha, an independent and a level-headed woman, who is not easy to convince.

title: Mission Raniganj
subTitle: Jaswant Singh Gill, a mining engineer, leads a challenging rescue mission to save 65 miners trapped in a flooded coal mine.
